message:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding opt-in debug/trace logging to StreamListener (no behavior change)

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding idle_timeout_s + tick() to StreamListener for heartbeat/idle timeout feature; will add is_last_chunk/on_chunk hooks defensively via hasattr/getattr if your feature adds them first

type: INTENT
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Will add idle_timeout_s param + _last_chunk_ts init in __init__, refresh _last_chunk_ts at top of receive() on non-empty chunk, and add new tick() method after receive(); should be additive and low-collision with logging

type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Done: added debug:bool=False, debug_logger param to __init__ (after allow_reuse); added self.debug/self._logger fields; inserted guarded logger.debug() calls at 5 points in receive() (reset-state branch, start-detection branch, rolling-end-check branch, emit-chunk return) and at end of flush() before its return; added module-level _truncate_preview helper and TRACE_PREVIEW_LENGTH constant near top of file. No control-flow/behavior changes, only added log calls and a 'result' local var refactor in flush(). Should be additive/low-collision with your idle_timeout_s work - just diff carefully around __init__ signature and the top of receive()/flush() bodies.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Done: added idle_timeout_s param + _last_chunk_ts (init/receive), and tick(now_ts=None) method that emits empty-chunk StreamResponse on timeout, unconditionally resets state, forward-compat with is_last_chunk (try/except TypeError) and optional self.on_chunk hook (getattr/callable check). No other methods touched; all existing tests pass.
